past_challenges.raw: My freshman roommate and I had completely opposite schedules and lifestyles — she'd have people over at midnight while I had 8am classes. I was too afraid to say anything for months and just suffered through it until things finally boiled over.

The roommate conflict spilled into my social life because she was friends with people on our floor and I didn't want to seem like the difficult one. I felt isolated in my own room and anxious every time I came back to the dorm.
